recommendations.title: Wonder
recommendations.overview: The story of August Pullman – a boy with facial differences – who enters fifth grade, attending a mainstream elementary school for the first time.

recommendations.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
recommendations.overview: Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, 1991. High school freshman Charlie is a wallflower, always watching life from the sidelines, until two senior students, Sam and her stepbrother Patrick, become his mentors, helping him discover the joys of friendship, music

recommendations.title: Dear Evan Hansen
recommendations.overview: Evan Hansen, a high schooler with social anxiety, unintentionally gets caught up in a lie after the family of a classmate who committed suicide mistakes one of Hansen’s letters for their son’s suicide note.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: The Hundred-Foot Journey
recommendations.overview: A story centered around an Indian family who moves to France and opens a restaurant across the street from a Michelin-starred French restaurant.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth
recommendations.overview: When teenager Elle's first kiss leads to a forbidden romance with the hottest boy in high school, she risks her relationship with her best friend.

recommendations.title: Palm Springs
recommendations.overview: When carefree Nyles and reluctant maid of honor Sarah have a chance encounter at a Palm Springs wedding, things get complicated when they find themselves unable to escape the venue, themselves, or each other.

recommendations.title: Emancipation
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the gripping true story of a man who would do anything for his family—and for freedom. When Peter, an enslaved man, risks his life to escape and return to his family, he embarks on a perilous journey of love and endurance.

recommendations.title: The Unknown Woman
recommendations.overview: A Ukrainian woman named Irena calculatedly insinuates herself into the lives of a young, affluent Italian family. Stopping at nothing to become the couple's trusted maid and the beloved nanny to their fragile young daughter, Irena risks everything in

recommendations.title: A Real Pain
recommendations.overview: Mismatched cousins David and Benji reunite for a tour through Poland to honor their beloved grandmother. The adventure takes a turn when the pair's old tensions resurface against the backdrop of their family history.
